statement: In every magma, Equation 1988 (`x = (y * (z * y)) * (w * y)`) implies Equation 2572 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0402
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z y)) (op w y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) y)) y)
